why_not_complete: Top-level fixed script-runner surfaces, stale deploy provider execution, browser deterministic-probe naming claims, CLI/contract Manus wording marketing overclaims, fixture-eval production-readiness overclaims, red-team catalog-fixture overclaims, secret-canary value emission, self-improvement dry-run overclaims, release validation evidence overclaims, P5 policy/tool gateway overclaims, P5 HITL fixture overclaims, L3 boolean approval bypasses, P5 replay readiness overclaims, Brain safety wording overclaims, Brain JSON snapshot/projection/hash-chain evidence gaps, the Codex agent-run worker subprocess, runtime_commands direct git/taskkill process forms, agent-run diff-policy direct git subprocesses, OpenManus readiness direct image inspect subprocess, and agent-run OpenManus direct image inspect preflight, engine-run sandbox runtime attestation direct Docker/Podman probes, Codex agent-run worker direct subprocess execution, and OpenManus agent-run sandbox worker direct subprocess execution, and engine-run agent worker direct subprocess execution, and engine-run capture helper direct subprocess execution, and setup install/supply-chain direct subprocess execution are neutralized, but Manus-grade natural-language web-app agent readiness still requires independent production red-team/release evidence plus a real SQLite/concurrency-backed Brain kernel.
